delete.description: Deletes the object (and its thumbnail) at the given S3 key. If `ownerType` and `ownerId` are provided, the named row is excluded from the reference-count check so its own surviving `imageUrl` does not block the delete; the file is kept only when another row still references it. When the owner params are omitted, the file is deleted unconditionally.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: S3 key of the file to delete (e.g. `article/{listId}/{id}`).

parameters.name: ownerType
parameters.description: Entity kind that owns this image and is clearing its reference. Must be provided together with `ownerId`.

parameters.name: ownerId
parameters.description: Primary key of the owning row (uuid for `list_item` / `article_catalog`, barcode value for `barcode`). Must be provided together with `ownerType`.

volumeUnit.description: Unit of measurement (Pinch or volume unit)

partialStepUid.description: Reference to a partial step UUID
Optional reference to a partial step

id.description: Unique identifier of the partial step

name.description: Display name of the partial step

imageUrl.description: Public image URL for the recipe

favorites.description: Number of times this recipe was favorited

servingsUnit.description: Unit used for servings (e.g. Portion, g, ml)

shouldBePublic.description: Whether the recipe is publicly visible

showAuthor.description: Whether to show the author publicly

partialSteps.description: Optional partial steps for grouping instructions

copiedFromReceiptUuid.description: UUID of the recipe this one was copied from

nutriments.description: Calculated nutriments for the whole recipe

updatedAt.description: Last update date of the recipe

ingredientCount.description: Number of ingredients in the recipe. Only set when requesting recipe pagination with current stock

matchingIngredientCount.description: Number of ingredients in the recipe that match to the stock. Only set when requesting recipe pagination with current stock

amounts.description: Per-weekday amounts, ordered Monday through Sunday

additionalImageUrls.description: Additional product photo URLs, ordered. imageUrl is the primary photo.

listId.description: The list this item belongs to. Populated by the server on cross-list endpoints.

occurredAt.description: ISO timestamp when the change occurred

changedFields.description: Names of the ArticleDto fields whose value changed. Empty for created/deleted.

revertedFromId.description: Set if this entry was produced by reverting another history entry — points to that entry id.

nextCursor.description: Cursor for the next page (pass as `cursor` query param). Null when there are no more entries.

name.description: Either a plain string or a translation key object
Either a plain string or a translation key object

defaultAutoReduce.description: When true, items without explicit auto-reduce config but with high-confidence consumption history are auto-included in the cold-start accrual modal.

role.description: Role of the user (owner, editor, etc.)

userCount.description: Count of users that have access to the list.

shoppingItemCount.description: Count of active shopping items in the list.

currentList.description: Whether the list is your current list.

users.description: Users with access to this list

Role.description: Role to assign to the user

role.description: Role to assign to the user

users.description: Array of user UIDs with access

userUid.description: UID of the user to add

role.description: Role the invitee will receive when accepting

ttlMinutes.description: How many minutes the invite stays valid for. Defaults to 60.

token.description: Opaque token embedded in the share link

listUuid.description: List the invite grants access to

role.description: Role the invitee will receive when accepting

createdBy.description: UID of the owner who created the invite

expiresAt.description: When the invite stops being accepted

revokedAt.description: When the invite was revoked, if it has been

additionalImageUrls.description: Additional product photo URLs, ordered. imageUrl is the primary photo.

purchaseRowId.description: Row primary key in purchase table — used for DELETE

productKey.description: Stable identity. "bc:<barcode>" when a barcode exists, otherwise "nb:<name>|<brand>" (both normalized to lower-case + trimmed).

marketUids.description: Distinct supermarket UIDs this product has been purchased at.

hasContentChange.description: True if at least one content-volume change has been detected for this product.

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page; absent when no more pages.

date.description: ISO date string of the change.

name.description: Either a plain string or a translation key object
Either a plain string or a translation key object

listId.description: Origin list of this pantry when returned by the cross-list "merged" endpoint in all-blocks mode. Not set on per-list responses.
Origin list of this unit when returned by the cross-list "merged" endpoint in all-blocks mode. Not set on per-list responses.

receiptName.description: Receipt name as recognised by OCR

catalogItemUuid.description: UUID of the matching article catalog item

listId.description: ID of the list of the items

additionalImageUrls.description: Additional product photo URLs, ordered. imageUrl is the primary photo.

indexable.description: False when the page should render <meta name="robots" content="noindex">. Computed from name length, brand, category, image, and offer presence.

name.description: Default product name (matches the row written by the import pipeline).

nameByLanguage.description: Language-specific name overrides keyed by IETF language tag (de-DE, en-US, ...).

categoryUuid.description: Raw category UUID. The frontend resolves name/slug from its local category list.

indexable.description: False when the page should render <meta name="robots" content="noindex">.

additionalImageUrls.description: Additional product photo URLs, ordered. imageUrl is the primary photo.

index.description: Index of the group inside the product group list

bestBefore.description: Best before date in that group

articleIsOpen.description: Indicates whether the product group contains an opened product

remainingAmount.description: Remaining amount in the opened product

unitId.description: Unit of the content. Besides the enum it's possible that custom IDs are used here

productGroups.description: Product groups contain all relevant information about everything related to storage.

unitId.description: Unit of the content. Besides the enum it's possible that custom IDs are used here

productGroups.description: Product groups contain all relevant information about everything related to storage.

productGroupIndex.description: Index of the product group to change the amount of

pantryId.description: Pantry id of the product group you want to change the amount of. If no group is found, a new one will be created

autoRestock.description: When true, and the resulting pantry amount lands at or below the item's configured `minimumAmount` (with `manageMinimumAmount` enabled), the server also adds the item to the shopping list by name. Designed for automation clients (Home Assistant NFC scans, voice assistants, etc.) that want a single round-trip 'consume + reorder' contract. Defaults to false so app-driven decrements keep their current behaviour.

source.description: Optional tag describing where the change originated. Written to `amount_change_log.source`. Defaults to `manual`.

isFavourite.description: Indicates whether the location is marked as your favourite

url.description: The URL of the recipe to parse

type.description: The type of parsing to perform

base64.description: The base64 encoded data of the attachment (image/document)

mimeType.description: The mime type of the attachment

imageUrl.description: Public image URL for the recipe

favorites.description: Number of times this recipe was favorited

servingsUnit.description: Unit used for servings (e.g. Portion, g, ml)

shouldBePublic.description: Whether the recipe is publicly visible

showAuthor.description: Whether to show the author publicly

partialSteps.description: Optional partial steps for grouping instructions

copiedFromReceiptUuid.description: UUID of the recipe this one was copied from

nutriments.description: Calculated nutriments for the whole recipe

updatedAt.description: Last update date of the recipe

ingredientCount.description: Number of ingredients in the recipe. Only set when requesting recipe pagination with current stock

matchingIngredientCount.description: Number of ingredients in the recipe that match to the stock. Only set when requesting recipe pagination with current stock

text.description: The raw text of the recipe to parse
text.example:
Banana Pancakes

Ingredients:
- 2 bananas
- 2 eggs

Directions:
1. Mash bananas...

timestamp.description: When the log line was produced on the client.

sessionId.description: Stable UUID for the current tab/PWA session.

data.description: Optional structured payload. PII MUST NOT be included here — these fields land in Loki for 7 days. Reviewed during implementation.

entries.description: Log entries to ingest. Max 50 per batch.

accepted.description: Number of entries written to stdout.

rejected.description: Number of entries dropped during ingest.
